topic: Copilot CLI 1.0.34 hook-config JSON schema resolution

focus: Ground-truth the current Copilot CLI 1.0.34 hook-config schema from primary sources

graphEvents.summary: Official docs still use flat bash/powershell command fields
Superset wrapper rewrites .github/hooks/superset-notify.json
Live copilot -p debug blocked by SecItemCopyMatching -50 in sandbox

focus: Identify the exact config entry Copilot rejects and extract the Copilot binary hook validator source

graphEvents.summary: Current Copilot 1.0.34 validator source found in ~/.copilot/pkg/universal/1.0.34/app.js
Executor throw occurs after validation when a command object reaches execution without bash or powershell
Visible project .github/hooks/superset-notify.json and Superset wrapper generated entries are schema-valid
Codex/plugin command-only hook configs are concrete candidates only if loaded through a non-normalizing path
Copilot 1.0.34 exposes ACP as a global --acp flag

focus: Trace Copilot 1.0.34 hook parser/executor and empirically prove the flat bash patch shape executes

graphEvents.summary: Copilot 1.0.34 hook command schema accepts flat bash, powershell, or command alias with timeout/timeoutSec
File-based hooks are flattened one wrapper level and event aliases are canonicalized before Zod validation
The Neither bash nor powershell error is an executor-time unnormalized-object error, not proof that flat bash is invalid
Isolated temp repo flat bash config logged Executing hook and Spawned hook command for userPromptSubmitted and sessionStart
Flat bash entries in .github/hooks/*.json are not invalid on Copilot CLI 1.0.34

focus: Trace post-parse hook sources and identify which source can place a no-bash/no-powershell object into userPromptSubmitted execution

graphEvents.summary: Copilot 1.0.34 reads .claude/settings*.json and .github/copilot/settings*.json repo hooks, not only .github/hooks/*.json
sessionStart filters to type=command but userPromptSubmitted maps every entry, explaining the asymmetric failure
Real logs show the failure before model request setup, matching userPromptSubmitted hook timing
Session-store and ad-hoc SDK hooks add callback functions, not raw command objects

focus: Build combined .github/hooks plus Claude-wrapper repro and test smallest Copilot-safe wrapper mitigation

graphEvents.summary: Combined repro executes flat .github hook then reproduces the missing-shell failure from the Claude wrapper
Adding top-level Copilot-safe bash to the Claude wrapper neutralizes the failure while leaving nested Claude hooks present
Non-interactive repro harness requires --allow-all before prompt/session hooks execute
The .github/hooks/superset-notify.json flat bash patch remains correct and unchanged
COPILOT_OFFLINE=true is not a valid hook-collision reproducer path in this harness
Rewriting .github/hooks/superset-notify.json alone is not a complete remediation while Claude wrappers are ingested

focus: Test Claude Code compatibility of top-level Copilot-safe fields on the Claude UserPromptSubmit wrapper
noveltyJustification: Only one final compatibility question remained; iteration 006 adds decisive Claude Code evidence but does not change the schema, patch, or Copilot reproducer conclusions from iterations 003-005.

graphEvents.summary: Official Claude Code docs define nested matcher wrappers with executable handlers inside the inner hooks array
Claude Code 2.1.117 accepts top-level Copilot-only type/bash/timeoutSec fields on a UserPromptSubmit wrapper
Claude executes the nested command and ignores the top-level Copilot bash field
The .github/hooks/superset-notify.json flat bash patch remains correct
The implementation-safe additional patch is to add a top-level no-op Copilot command to the Claude wrapper
Claude rejects wrapper objects with top-level Copilot-only fields
Claude executes the top-level Copilot bash field as an extra hook

focus: Confirm convergence and avoid padding after iteration 006 completed the schema answer, patch shape, and repro evidence
noveltyJustification: No new schema facts were needed; iteration 007 only re-checked the convergence contract, active file state, and prior empirical evidence before ruling out further research as lower value than implementation.

graphEvents.summary: Iteration 006 already satisfied the research-only convergence signal; the remaining work is implementation plus live project smoke validation
The safe handoff remains: keep .github/hooks/superset-notify.json flat, then add top-level type/bash/timeoutSec to .claude/settings.local.json hooks.UserPromptSubmit[0]
Further schema research is unlikely to reduce open KQs because the unresolved item is post-patch live validation

focus: Close the loop after iteration 007 confirmed the schema answer, patch shape, and empirical reproducer were complete
noveltyJustification: No new schema facts were needed; iteration 008 records the third consecutive below-threshold novelty score and rules out further schema search as less valuable than implementation.

graphEvents.summary: Convergence threshold is satisfied for three consecutive iterations: 006 at 0.04, 007 at 0.02, and 008 at 0.01
The .github/hooks/superset-notify.json correction remains the flat Copilot bash shape already present in the active file
The remaining validation depends on implementation patching .claude/settings.local.json, not on additional schema research
Continuing iteration 8 as another schema search would pad the loop rather than reduce open KQs
